calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Return Property Illegally Seized
Off Calendar Mar-16-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. VANCE CHANG, ESQ. of Wong & Hung, Tel No. 510-451-2124 appearing for Claimant Viola Liu;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to CLAIMANT VIOLA LIU'S Motion To Return Property Illegally Seized, Respondent's motion for the return of the property seized from her is granted in large part. Except for withholding the amount claimed by the Franchise Tax Board, petitioner is required to return all items seized from Ms. Liu other than illegal narcotics. Both sides appear to believe that the standard governing this motion is whether there is "probable cause" to believe the seized items are subject to forfeiture. However, where, as here, the motion seeks return of more than $25,000 in cash and there is no underlying or related criminal action, petitioner has the burden of proving that the cash is subject to forfeiture by "clear and convincing evidence." (Health and Safety Code 11488.4(i)(4)). Petitioner has failed to do so. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Return Property Illegally Seized
Off Calendar Jan-15-2016 Continued To Mar-16-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

CLAIMANT VIOLA LIU'S Motion To Return Property Illegally Seized is continued to March 16, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, per the agreement of the parties.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/EG)
